kamloops.title: As drought deepens, Okanagan leaders unite to protect water supply
kamloops.description: The Okanagan's water crisis didn't begin with the scorching summer heat. It began months ago, high in the mountains, where winter failed to deliver enough snow

all.title: Wildfire risk to heighten globally in 2026 due to ‘historic’ El Niño
all.description: A potentially historic El Niño is all but confirmed for 2026, heightening wildfire and other risks across the globe, according to recent reports from the world’s forecasting agencies. The European Commission’s Joint Research Centre has determined that an El Niño event this year was “virtually certain” based on all seasonal forecast modelling systems. The fluctuating [&#8230

all.title: Abbotsford police launch radar units around city to help catch speeders
all.description: The new technology monitors and records passing vehicle speeds, the time of day something happens, traffic volumes and lane usage.
